settings.title: Unlimited 24/7 support
settings.text: Every MEDVi program includes 24/7 licensed-provider access, unlimited messaging, free discreet shipping, and our 90-day results guarantee.

settings.question: How do I get started?
settings.answer: Complete our 2-minute medical intake. A provider reviews within 24 hours.

settings.question: Can I cancel anytime?
settings.answer: Yes — no contracts, cancel in one click.
